name: Focaccia Bread Topping
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces smoked mozzarella or scamorza, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and minced garlic.
2. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
3. Add the halved cherry tomatoes and toss everything together.
4. Leave at room temperature. This can be prepared several hours ahead.
5. Preheat the broiler.
6. Place the grated cheese on top of focaccia or half a loaf of Italian bread (toasted) or slices of toasted bread.
7. Place under the broiler until the cheese is melted and the crust is golden.
8. Remove from the oven and top with the tomato mixture and sliced basil.
9. Serve immediately.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
